caption: 图1-1 数据通路框图
llm_description: Block diagram of a CPU architecture showing core components including ALU, registers (DR0, DR1, PC, AR), memory interface, microcontroller, and I/O control with labeled signal lines for data flow and control operations.

A computer architecture diagram titled "计算机组成原理" (Principles of Computer Organization) displays the initial register states for a simple CPU model, with all general-purpose registers (R0-R2), data registers (DR0-DR1), control units (PC, IR, MC), and memory/bus components initialized to zero or specific values like MC=018110, presented as a textbook figure labeled "图 1-9 LCD液晶显示屏" (Figure 1-9 LCD Display).

caption: 图 1-3 模型计算机电路原理图
llm_description: This is a detailed schematic diagram of a digital logic circuit, likely for a microprocessor or microcontroller system. It features interconnected components including registers (reg_3, Instruction REG), an ALU (ALU181), RAM (LPM RAM DQ), multiplexers (BUSMUX, LPM MUX), decoders (decodea, decodeb, decodec), and various logic gates and flip-flops. The diagram shows data paths, control signals, and connections between modules such as the bus, program counter (PC), instruction register (IR), and output devices (LED_B). It includes labeled inputs/outputs (e.g., P0-P16, d[0:7], clk, rst) and uses standard digital logic symbols to represent the internal architecture of the system.

This is a schematic diagram of a digital circuit, likely a CPU or microcontroller core, showing interconnected components including an ALU (Arithmetic Logic Unit), registers, RAM, a PLL (Phase-Locked Loop) for clock generation, and a display output interface. Signals flow between modules via labeled buses and control lines, illustrating the data path and control logic for processing instructions and driving external displays.

caption: 写入 RAM
